scripts.name: Morning Plan
scripts.description: Generate daily plan from yesterday's log, todos, JIRA, and calendar

scripts.name: Midday Refresh
scripts.description: Sync calendar, reschedule tasks into free blocks, update daily note

scripts.name: Daily Summary
scripts.description: Create end-of-day work summary with git commits, completed todos, meetings

scripts.name: Daily Context Updater
scripts.description: Refresh AI context files in the vault

scripts.name: Weekly Summary
scripts.description: Aggregate daily summaries into weekly report

scripts.name: Weekly Reflection
scripts.description: Personal reflection after weekly summary syncs

scripts.name: Theme Sync
scripts.description: Watch system theme and sync to Claude Code

scripts.name: Meeting Start
scripts.description: MeetingBar event handler: save metadata and start recording

scripts.name: Meeting Stop
scripts.description: Stop recording, resolve meeting name, move audio file

scripts.name: Transcribe & Process
scripts.description: Whisper transcription, hallucination detection, domain corrections, diarization, meeting note creation

scripts.name: Meeting Intelligence
scripts.description: AI analysis and summary of meeting transcript

scripts.name: Archive Work Log
scripts.description: Move old daily/weekly summaries to quarterly archive folders

scripts.name: Process Drafts Inbox
scripts.description: Triage Drafts inbox items into Obsidian vault or Apple Reminders

scripts.name: Process Reminders Inbox
scripts.description: Triage Apple Reminders Inbox items into correct lists or Obsidian

scripts.name: Enrich Connections
scripts.description: Discover related notes using semantic search and add wikilinks

scripts.name: Meeting Tasks Extractor
scripts.description: Scan recent meeting notes for action items not yet created as Task Notes

scheduled.label: Scheduled
scheduled.description: Launchd agents that run on a timer

manual.label: On-Demand
manual.description: Manually triggered via Claude Code, Raycast, or CLI
